name: Dundee Cake (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 325°F/Gas 3.
2. Grease an 8-inch round cake tin and line with greaseproof paper.
3. Cream the fat and sugar in a bowl.
4. Sift the flour, salt, and spices together.
5. Add the baking powder to the last of the flour.
6. Stir in the ground almonds.
7. Add the fruit peel.
8. Mix gently until combined.
9. Pour into the prepared tin.
10. Arrange the split almonds evenly on top of the cake.
11. Bake for about 2 hours. If the top is browning too quickly after the first hour, cover with greaseproof paper.
12. Allow the cake to cool slightly in the tin before turning out onto a wire rack.
13. The cake will keep for several weeks if wrapped in kitchen foil.
